hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'supabase/migrations/0[0-9]{2}_'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify applied migrations. Create a new migration.' && exit 2; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM audit_logs'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive DB operation.' && exit 2; fi; exit 0
